name: aistudy.notionKnowledgeImport
purpose: Import Notion course content into AIstudy knowledge points by matching Notion heading sections to mind-map node ids.

notionUrl.description: Public Notion page URL, shared page URL, or database view URL.

rootPath.description: Optional mind-map path used to limit matching scope.

procedure.name: check_standard
procedure.goal: Ensure the MCP program and guide exist before any import work.

procedure.name: check_access
procedure.goal: Check whether Notion, courses.json, and MySQL are available.
rules: Stop when courses.json is missing or unreadable.
Continue without MySQL only when JSON write is possible.
Never invent Notion content when the source is unreadable.

procedure.name: resolve_notion_source
rules: Extract the Notion page id from the URL.
Extract the view id when the URL contains a database view.
Prefer public Notion read access, then local cache, then exported files.

procedure.name: extract_notion_blocks
rules: Preserve source order.
Read from Notion only; never write to Notion.
Return an explicit empty-source error when no blocks are available.

procedure.name: normalize_heading_tree
rules: Treat header, sub_header, sub_sub_header, and header_4 as hierarchy anchors.
Treat text, list, callout children, and table rows as content under the nearest heading.
Strip numbering markers only for matching, not for stored content.
Drop empty sections.

procedure.name: load_aistudy_course
rules: Find the course by exact title first.
Do not write to another course when the requested course is missing.
Index every mindMap node by id and path.

procedure.name: match_headings_to_nodes
rules: Prefer exact path match within rootPath.
Then match exact title under the same parent.
Then match normalized title by removing chapter numbers and bracketed markers.
Do not choose automatically when candidates are ambiguous.
Do not write unmatched headings.

procedure.name: dry_run_report
rules: safeToWrite is false when ambiguousCount is greater than 0.
Show sectionHeading, nodePath, and confidence for every match.

procedure.name: enforce_write_preflight
rules: Block writing when dryRun is true.
Block writing when safeToWrite is false.
Block writing when matchedCount is 0.
Block writing when ambiguousHeadings is not empty.
Block writing when any match lacks nodeId, nodePath, confidence, or source heading.
Block writing when courses.json cannot be backed up.
Block writing when the target course cannot be found by exact title.
Require a node-id match table before any write.

procedure.name: write_knowledge_points
rules: Write by node id only.
Do not write by visible title alone.
Use paragraph HTML for text content.
Sanitize HTML to paragraph, list, bold, italic, underline, strike, and line-break tags.
Reject script, style, iframe, object, embed, form, event handler attributes, and javascript: URLs.
Reject empty HTML after sanitization.
Preserve unrelated course data and unrelated node knowledge.
When overwritePolicy is skip_existing, keep non-empty existing knowledge.
When overwritePolicy is replace, replace only matched node ids.

procedure.name: backup_and_persist_json
rules: Close AIstudy before direct file writes.
Backup courses.json before writing.
Write JSON atomically by writing a temporary file and renaming it when possible.
Never partially rewrite the courses array.
Abort if the JSON parse check fails after writing the temporary file.

procedure.name: sync_mysql_if_available
rules: Use MySQL only when configured and reachable.
Do not fail the JSON import only because MySQL is offline.
Report mysqlSynced=false when skipped.

procedure.name: verify_import
rules: Verify at least three sample node ids after writing when writtenCount is at least three.
Verify every written node when writtenCount is less than three.
Verify MySQL payload length or row update when MySQL is configured.
Report the backup path.

requiredBeforeWrite: every match has nodeId and nodePath
allowedMutationSurface: courses.payload_json for the same target course when MySQL is reachable

uiCopyPolicy.preferredText: short labels, state text, concise empty states, clear actions
